test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient focused coverage: tactical source-contract tests lock the shared close helper ordering, non-modal guard reset, and no-exit behavior; live GUI tests verify non-modal File->Quit and title-bar close plus BattleSim modal unwind; TacticalTests and GuiTests both passed on rerun.
documentation_accuracy_summary: FBattleScreen header comments and DesignNotes accurately describe the centralized close lifecycle, non-modal guard reset, modal unwind behavior, and the absence of exit/main-loop shutdown in the tactical close path.
assumptions: No separate plan file was required because the verifier prompt and documenter handoff fully scoped this focused close-path review.
